description:
Tailscale is a WireGuard based mesh VPN, used to connect your computers and other devices together securely without proxies.


Note: 1.98.6 and 1.98.7 were release candidates intended for testing only.
All Platforms
- Fixed: An issue causing connectivity disruptions when the operating system wakes from sleep in wireguard-go is resolved.
- Fixed: An issue causing excessive handshake initiation retries in wireguard-go is resolved.
- Fixed: An issue causing connection leaks in Tailscale SSH Session Recording is resolved.
